title: Weather Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Weather plugin - displays current conditions, hourly forecast, and daily forecast

enabled.description: Enable or disable the weather plugin

display_duration.description: How long to display each weather mode in seconds

update_interval.description: How often to fetch new weather data in seconds (minimum 300 = 5 minutes)

api_key.description: Deprecated — no longer used. Kept for backward compatibility with existing configs.
api_key.title: API Key (deprecated)

location_state.description: State or province name (optional but recommended for US cities to avoid ambiguity)
location_state.title: State/Province

location_country.description: Country code (e.g., US, GB, CA, FR). Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes.
location_country.title: Country Code

display_format.description: Display format for current weather. Supports placeholders: {temp}, {condition}, {humidity}, {wind}
display_format.title: Display Format

show_current_weather.description: Show current weather conditions with temperature, humidity, UV index, and wind
show_current_weather.title: Show Current Weather

show_hourly_forecast.description: Show hourly forecast for the next 24 hours
show_hourly_forecast.title: Show Hourly Forecast

show_daily_forecast.description: Show daily forecast for the next 3-7 days
show_daily_forecast.title: Show Daily Forecast

show_almanac.description: Show almanac display with sunrise/sunset, moon phase, and day length
show_almanac.title: Show Almanac

show_radar.description: Show precipitation radar imagery from RainViewer (free, no API key needed)
show_radar.title: Show Radar

show_alerts.description: Show weather alerts/warnings when active (takes priority in display rotation)
show_alerts.title: Show Weather Alerts

show_feels_like.description: Show feels-like temperature on current conditions (requires display height ≥48px)
show_feels_like.title: Show Feels Like

show_dew_point.description: Show dew point on current conditions (requires display height ≥48px)
show_dew_point.title: Show Dew Point

show_visibility.description: Show visibility distance on current conditions (requires display height ≥48px)
show_visibility.title: Show Visibility

show_pressure.description: Show barometric pressure on current conditions (requires display height ≥48px)
show_pressure.title: Show Pressure

radar_zoom.description: Radar zoom level (4=regional, 6=local, 8=very close). Higher values show more detail but less area.
radar_zoom.title: Radar Zoom Level

radar_line_color.description: RGB color for state boundary lines on radar map (WeatherStar style). Default is green.
radar_line_color.title: Radar Map Line Color

radar_fill_color.description: RGB color for land fill on radar map. Use [0,0,0] for no fill (outlines only).
radar_fill_color.title: Radar Map Land Color

radar_update_interval.description: How often to refresh radar imagery in seconds (RainViewer updates every 10 minutes)
radar_update_interval.title: Radar Update Interval
